title: Orbital Debris Capture Boom: Multi-Load-Case Minimum-Mass Strut Sizing
strategies: uniform sizing: one cross-section for every strut, just large enough to pass the worst stress and grapple-pointing limit across both capture load cases (baseline)
one-shot per-bar sizing against the single dominant net-drag load case, then uniform stiffening to clear the remaining load case and the pointing budget
multi-load-case fully-stressed design: iterate the FEM, size each strut to its worst axial force across all load cases, then add minimal uniform stiffness for pointing
sensitivity-based stiffening that adds material where it cuts grapple-head drift per kilogram most
